2007October 28, 2007

🇺🇸 Dallas, TX, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Dallas, United States, October 28, 2007 -- November 2, 2007

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2007-11-irving-dallas-tx-usa

13 Resolutions

734Plenary
Initiate PWI for business documents for product transaction
SC4 initiates a Preliminary Work Item for "Business documents for product transaction and management" as described in SC4 N2253.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
733Plenary
Change title, clarify scope, and reassign ISO 8000 master data item
SC4 resolves to change the title of the ISO work item 42919 from "Catalogue management systems -- Requirements" to "Data quality -- Master data". SC4 clarifies that the scope of the work item is ma...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
732Plenary
Extend AP 203 ed2 scope to include technical drawings
SC4 approves the extension of the scope of AP203 ed2 to include the two extra modules required for technical drawings. The Preliminary Work item for AP201 ed2 is cancelled.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
731Plenary
Initiate PWI for AP 210 ed3
SC4 initiates a Preliminary Work Item for AP 210 ed3 for the purpose of minor extensions and maintenance.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
730Plenary
Collaborate with SC 1 on ISO 10303-238 and ISO 14649 harmonization
SC4 requests its Secretariat to invite SC 1 to collaborate on the harmonization, subject to successful resolution of the current patent issue. In recognition of the substantial damage that the pate...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
729Plenary
Address ISO 14649 patent issues to avoid restricting standards
SC4 expresses its extreme concern at the violation of the common ITU-R/ITU-T/ISO/IEC patent policy by the issuance of patents on the implementation of ISO 14649, and the resulting proposal for furt...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
728Plenary
Create a Big Picture showing relationship of standards
SC4 requests the PPC to continue and extend its existing work to generate a "Big Picture" illustrating the relationship and interaction of standards created by ISO/TC 184 in an operational environm...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
727Plenary
Appoint Soonhung Han as liaison officer to ISO/TC 8 and SC 10
SC4 appoints Mr. Soonhung Han as the liaison officer to ISO/TC 8 "Ships and marine technology" and its SC 10.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
726Plenary
Appoint Inhan Kim as liaison officer to IAI
SC4 appoints Mr. Inhan Kim as the liaison officer to the International Alliance for Interoperability (IAI).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
725Plenary
Appoint Dr. Peter Langer as liaison officer to ISO/TC 118
SC4 requests the Secretariat to establish a liaison with ISO/TC 118 "Compressors, pneumatic tools and pneumatic machines" and invites ISO/TC 118 to nominate Dr. Peter Langer as liaison officer to I...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its deepest appreciation to SOLE -- The International Society of Logistics for its hosting of the 53rd ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Plenary Meeting at the Omni Mandalay Hotel at Las Colinas, Irvin...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
